title: AN ACT EXPANDING THE PIODURAN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL, WITH A TWENTY-FIVE-BED CAPACITY, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIGAO, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, INTO A FIFTY-BED CAPACITY HOSPITAL

chunks.text:
H. No. 381 / 88 OG No. 18, 2523 (May 4, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7269, March 20, 1992 ]

AN ACT EXPANDING THE PIODURAN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL, WITH A TWENTY-FIVE-BED CAPACITY, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIGAO, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, INTO A FIFTY-BED CAPACITY HOSPITAL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Pioduran Emergency Hospital, a twenty-five-bed capacity hospital in the Municipality of Ligao, Province of Albay, is hereby expanded into a fifty-bed capacity hospital.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be charged against the lump-sum appropriations authorized for the purpose under the current General Appropriations Act. Thereafter, such sums as may be necessary for the operation and maintenance of the hospital shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 22, 1991 and December 10, 1991, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: March 20, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
